description: Letter in which a physician traveling from Cairo to Damascus describes how he was honored by the Jewish judge of Bilbays. The addressee is Shemuel ha-Sar. Mainly in Hebrew, with a few lines in Judaeo-Arabic at the end. (Information from Mediterranean Society, IV, pp. 227, 228).
description_he: מכתב בעברית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
